text: About Us KR POWER SUPPORT Electrical Contractors & Cable tray and Panel Builders Manufacturer in Coimbatore, established in the year 1995 with an ambition to deliver the needs of customers requiring services in “Electrical field”. For over 3 decades we provide a quality services and satisfaction in all our works.We carry out Electrical installation and panel works for large scale industries. Hi-Mount Power Support & KR Engineering our sister concern is widely involved in Manufacturing of panel Boards, Control Panels, Bus Ducts, Cable trays and Solar structures. Starting from Coimbatore we extended our quality services in major states across India. We have a good team of experienced Engineers, Supervisors, Technicians and well-trained Labors. Our Professionals work diligently to ensure flawless services & customer satisfaction. We are undertaking to turn my projects also. ORDERS EXECUTED - Hospitals - Textile Mills - Sugar Plants - Paper Mills - Founderies - Engineering Industries - Ciment Plant - Thermal Power Plant - commercial complex - Co-Generating Plants SUCCESS RATE All our success is attributed to our quality driven products that adhere to industry set parameters. In addition, we conduct stringent quality tests on the entire range of products. Thus, we ensure defect free products to reach the end users. With our exclusive R&D unit, we are able to renovate our range of products that has led us a huge reputation in the market. Moreover, with our client-centric approach, we are able to earn their trust and goodwill at all times. We have gained immense popularity with our prompt and timely delivery policies. Our company is able to sustain the tough challenges and competitions of the industry under the able guidance of our Chairman & MD. He has invested his high business acumen and ethical values to lead us on the path of success. With his transparent and prompt business dealings, we have earned a huge client base in the market segments. Henceforth, we are able to reach the top position in lieu of our competitors. “The price of success is hard work, dedication to the job at hand, and the determination that whether we win or lose, we have applied the best of ourselves to the task at hand.”
